_note: Live worker registry, keyed by spoke root. The hub records a worker here right after spawning it (spoke -> agentId + task + ts), so other sessions reuse it via SendMessage instead of spawning fresh (= re-paying onboarding). Copy this to active-workers.json (git-ignored) in your hub, or let worker-registry-write.sh create it. Entries older than 24h are treated as dead. See docs/worker-reuse.md.
